"""Register all route blueprints."""

from app.routes.news import news_bp
from app.routes.sources import sources_bp
from app.routes.stats import stats_bp
from app.routes.refresh import refresh_bp
from app.routes.docs import docs_bp
from app.routes.keys import keys_bp
from app.routes.usage import usage_bp
from app.routes.market import market_bp
from app.routes.static_pages import static_bp
import os


def register_routes(app):
    app.register_blueprint(news_bp)
    app.register_blueprint(sources_bp)
    app.register_blueprint(stats_bp)
    app.register_blueprint(refresh_bp)
    app.register_blueprint(docs_bp)
    app.register_blueprint(keys_bp)
    app.register_blueprint(usage_bp)
    app.register_blueprint(market_bp)

    # Admin routes only load when ADMIN_ENABLED=true (admin ECS service)
    if os.environ.get("ADMIN_ENABLED", "true").lower() == "true":
        from app.admin.routes import admin_bp
        app.register_blueprint(admin_bp)

    app.register_blueprint(static_bp)

            # AC1: Snapshot returns correct fields

            missing = [f for f in expected_fields if f not in data]
            print(f'\\nAC1 - Snapshot response status: {r.status_code}')
            print(f'AC1 - Snapshot fields present: {list(data.keys())}')
            print(f'AC1 - Missing fields: {missing}')
            print(f'AC1 - Sample values: symbol={data.get(\"symbol\")}, price={data.get(\"price\")}, updated_at={data.get(\"updated_at\")}')
            
            # AC2: Details returns correct fields
            mock_polygon.get_ticker_details.return_value = {

            print(f'\\nAC2 - Details response status: {r.status_code}')
            print(f'AC2 - Details fields present: {list(data.keys())}')
            print(f'AC2 - Missing fields: {missing}')
            print(f'AC2 - name={data.get(\"name\")}, sector={data.get(\"sector\")}')
            
            # AC4: 404 for unknown tickers

            print(f'AC4 - Error response: {json.dumps(data)}')
            print(f'AC4 - Descriptive message: {\"ZZZZZ\" in data.get(\"message\", \"\")}')
            
            mock_polygon.get_ticker_details.return_value = None

            print(f'AC4 - Unknown ticker /api/market/ZZZZZ/details: status={r.status_code}')
            print(f'AC4 - Descriptive message: {\"ZZZZZ\" in data.get(\"message\", \"\")}')
            
            # AC5: 503 when Polygon unavailable

            r = c.get('/api/market/AAPL/details', headers=headers)

            print(f'AC5 - Disabled /api/market/AAPL/details: status={r.status_code}, Retry-After={retry_after}')
            
            # AC6: Rate limit headers present

            }
            r = c.get('/api/market/AAPL', headers=headers)
            rl = r.headers.get('X-RateLimit-Limit')
            print(f'\\nAC6 - Rate limit header X-RateLimit-Limit: {rl}')
            print(f'AC6 - Rate limit active: {rl is not None}')

print('\\n--- All AC verifications complete ---')
